title: Report an issue
subtitle: Tell us what went wrong. We attach your screen, app version, and device details automatically - never your audit answers.

fields.title: What happened?
fields.severity: How much does it block you?

screenshot.failed: Couldn't attach the screen snapshot. You can still submit without it.
screenshot.attaching: Attaching a snapshot of this screen automatically.
screenshot.attached: A snapshot of this screen is attached automatically.
screenshot.unavailable: We could not attach this screen automatically. You can still send the report.
screenshot.privacyNote: We attach a picture of your current screen. Remove it if it shows anything sensitive.

placeholders.title: Short summary of the problem
placeholders.description: What did you do, what did you expect, and what happened instead?

matches.heading: These known issues might match - check them first

success: Thanks, your report has been sent.

errors.offline: You're offline. Your report is saved here - submit again once you're back online.
errors.generic: We couldn't send your report. Please try again.

queue.promptMessage_one: You have {{count}} bug report saved on this device. Submit it now?
queue.promptMessage_other: You have {{count}} bug reports saved on this device. Submit them now?
queue.flushed_one: Your saved report was sent. Thank you.
queue.flushed_other: {{count}} saved reports were sent. Thank you.
queue.flushPartial: Some reports couldn't be sent yet. We'll ask again next time you're online.
queue.savedOffline: You're offline. Your report is saved on this device - we'll prompt you to send it when you're back online.
queue.savedForLater: Your report is saved on this device. We'll prompt you to send it when you're back online.
